stemHtml: On an NDB approach, an aircraft is using QFE. ATC will inform the pilot that the vertical position of the aircraft will be expressed in terms of height above the runway threshold elevation when…

options.a: The threshold is 35 ft or more below the aerodrome elevation.
options.b: The threshold is 17 ft or more below the aerodrome elevation.
options.c: The threshold is 15 ft or more below the aerodrome elevation.
options.d: The threshold is 7 ft or more below the aerodrome elevation.
